home.title: Satellite-Based Crop Insurance
home.subtitle: Fast, transparent, and accurate claim processing powered by Google Earth Engine NDVI analysis and Machine Learning.
home.for_farmers_desc: Easily submit your crop insurance claim. Draw your farm boundary on our interactive map, select the extreme weather event, and track your claim status in real-time.
home.for_admins_desc: Verify claims rapidly using AI-powered insights. Review satellite NDVI difference maps, damage percentage estimates, and our ML model's recommendation.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How do I draw my farm boundary?
faq.a1: On the 'New Claim' page, you will see an interactive map. Use the polygon tool (the pentagon icon on the left side of the map) to click the corners of your farm. Click on your starting point to close the shape. The system will automatically capture the coordinates.
faq.a2: NDVI (Normalized Difference Vegetation Index) is a measure of healthy, green vegetation calculated using satellite imagery. We compare NDVI before and after an extreme weather event to accurately estimate crop damage.
faq.a3: Because our system uses automated Google Earth Engine retrieval and Machine Learning prediction, initial processing is instantaneous upon submission. Final approval by an administrator typically occurs within 24-48 hours.
